name: Dust‑choked Instruments
description: A sudden dust‑devil engulfs the convoy. Grit scours every surface. You can shield either the terrain scanner’s lenses or the atmospheric sensor’s delicate intakes. One will suffer damage.

effects.message: The terrain scanner survives intact, but the atmospheric sensor is choked with dust, losing {delta}% precision.
The atmospheric scanner remains clean, but the terrain scanner’s lenses are etched and lose {delta}% clarity.

name: Failing Generator
description: The main generator sputters and throws sparks. You can either route the dying power to the knowledge database or to the terrain scanner’s calibration array. The other will lose its saved state.

effects.message: The database hums safely, but the terrain scanner loses {delta}% calibration before it can reboot.
The scanner holds its settings, but the power flicker corrupts {delta}% of stored knowledge.

name: Corrosive Rainfall
description: A light but corrosive rain begins to fall. There’s time to cover either the atmospheric scanner’s weather vane or the precious analysis modules. The other will be etched by acid.

effects.message: The atmospheric scanner is safe, but one analysis kit is corroded beyond use. The caravan loses a scan charge.
The equipment is saved, but the atmospheric scanner’s vanes are pitted, lowering accuracy by {delta}%.

name: Data‑Surge Cascade
description: A power surge feeds back through the database. You can either dump the excess into the terrain scanner’s memory bank or let it flood the knowledge archives. One will be scrambled.

effects.message: The knowledge archive stays intact, but the terrain scanner’s banks lose {delta}% of mapping data.
The terrain scanner is spared, but the database loses {delta}% of its precious records.

name: Strained Unity
description: A bitter argument erodes morale. You can either address the crowd directly to keep everyone together, or let the anger run its course while you safeguard the knowledge library. One will suffer.

effects.message: The crowd calms, but during the chaos {delta}% of knowledge was accidentally deleted from the database.
The data is safe, but the unresolved anger causes unity to plummet by {delta}%.

name: Ruptured Coolant Line
description: A coolant pipe bursts near the equipment bay. You can either seal the area to protect the analysis modules, or vent the heat toward the terrain scanner’s CPU. One will overheat.

effects.message: The equipment is safe, but the terrain scanner’s processors overheat and lose {delta}% efficiency.

choices.text: Vent heat away from the terrain scanner

effects.message: The scanner stays cool, but one analysis module is scorched. A scan charge is lost.

name: Shifting Ground
description: A tremor opens a fissure that threatens two critical assets: the atmospheric scanner’s intake tower and the knowledge database’s external drive array. You can only brace one against the collapse.

effects.message: The scanner holds, but the database’s drives are shaken and {delta}% of data is corrupted.
The knowledge remains intact, but the atmospheric scanner’s alignment shifts by {delta}%.

name: Soured Water Supply
description: A contaminated water source forces a choice: you can deploy the terrain scanner’s filters to purify enough for your own people, preserving unity, or use the knowledge database to synthesise a filter that saves the survey equipment. One will fail.

effects.message: The people stay healthy, but one precious analysis module is ruined by the bad water. A scan is lost.

choices.text: Synthesise the filter for the equipment

effects.message: The equipment is saved, but the water shortage causes unity to drop by {delta}%.

name: Magnetic Storm
description: A geomagnetic storm fries electronics. You can either erect a makeshift Faraday cage around the knowledge database, or shield the terrain scanner’s magnetometer. The other will be wiped.

effects.message: The database survives, but the terrain scanner’s magnetometer loses {delta}% calibration.
The scanner holds, but the storm wipes {delta}% of the database.

name: Frozen Pipes
description: A sudden freeze bursts pipes in the equipment bay. You can either thaw the lines that feed the atmospheric scanner’s sensor suite, or repair the lines to the analysis storage. One will be left frozen.

effects.message: The scanner is fine, but a frozen analysis module cracks. One scan is lost.
The modules are safe, but the atmospheric scanner’s sensors degrade by {delta}%.

name: Toxic Spore Bloom
description: A cloud of toxic spores wafts through the camp. You can either deploy portable filters to help the settlers breathe, preserving their will to continue, or seal the atmospheric scanner’s intake, keeping its forecasts accurate. One will suffer.

effects.message: The settlers are safe, but the spores gum up the atmospheric scanner, reducing its accuracy by {delta}%.
The scanner stays clean, but the breathing problems cause unity to fall by {delta}%.

name: Fractured Hoses
description: Hydraulic hoses burst near the terrain scanner’s shock absorbers and the atmospheric scanner’s pressure sensor. You can only repair one set. The other will leak and lose functionality.

effects.message: The terrain scanner stays smooth, but the atmospheric scanner’s pressure sensor loses {delta}% accuracy.
The atmospheric scanner is fine, but the terrain scanner’s damping worsens by {delta}%.

name: Desperate Gamble
description: A risky shortcut could save time, but it requires shutting down either the knowledge database or the terrain scanner to avoid electrical interference. One will crash.

effects.message: The shortcut works, but the sudden shutdown corrupts {delta}% of the database.
The knowledge is safe, but the terrain scanner needs a {delta}% recalibration after the trip.

name: Bitter Frost
description: A sudden frost can crack either the unity‑bonding communal water heater or the delicate analysis modules in an unheated crate. You can only warm one.

effects.message: The settlers stay warm, but one frozen analysis module shatters. A scan is lost.
The equipment is saved, but the cold night causes unity to drop by {delta}%.

name: Quake‑damaged Wiring
description: An aftershock snaps cables to the atmospheric scanner’s transmitter and the knowledge database’s backup drive. Only one line can be reconnected before the system cycles down.

effects.message: The scanner returns, but the backup drive loses {delta}% of its data before power is restored.
The database is safe, but the atmospheric scanner’s transmitter is down, costing {delta}% of its range.

name: Scanner Calibration Drift
description: Age and vibration take their toll. The terrain scanner's delicate gyroscopes lose alignment, reducing its precision significantly.

effects.message: The terrain scanner's accuracy drops by {delta}%. Maintenance crews scramble to recalibrate.

name: Atmospheric Sensor Fouling
description: A thin film of residue coats the atmospheric sensor intakes. The readings become erratic, undermining weather predictions.

effects.message: The atmospheric scanner loses {delta}% of its sensitivity. Storms may come without warning.

name: Cross‑Calibration Opportunity
description: A rare window allows the two scanners to be recalibrated against each other. One can be boosted using the other's components, or you can leave both untouched.

choices.text: Use terrain scanner to recalibrate atmospheric

effects.message: The terrain scanner sacrifices {delta}% precision to improve the atmospheric scanner.
The atmospheric scanner gains {delta}% accuracy from the cross‑calibration.

choices.text: Use atmospheric scanner to recalibrate terrain

effects.message: The atmospheric scanner loses {delta}% sensitivity to boost the terrain scanner.
The terrain scanner improves by {delta}% using the atmospheric scanner's data.
The caravan decides not to meddle. No changes are made.

name: Dispute Over Rations
description: A flawed distribution of water causes a shouting match that fractures the caravan's fragile solidarity.

effects.message: Unity falls by {delta}% as old resentments resurface.

name: Database Corruption
description: A solar flare corrupts a portion of the knowledge database. Vital information is scrambled beyond recovery.

effects.message: {delta}% of stored knowledge is lost. Some lessons may have to be relearned.

name: Equipment Cache – Hidden Cost
description: A prospector's stash contains analysis modules, but they are locked behind a ciphered terminal. Hacking it will drain some of the caravan's knowledge banks.

effects.message: {delta}% of knowledge is sacrificed to break the encryption.
The analysis module is recovered. The caravan gains an extra scan.
The caravan leaves the cache untouched. No risks, no rewards.

name: Structural Collapse
description: While exploring a crumbling overpass, a section of concrete gives way. Dozens are caught in the debris before help can arrive.

effects.message: The collapse claims {delta} settlers. The caravan mourns and moves on.

name: Sandstorm Disorientation
description: A ferocious sandstorm swallows the convoy whole. When the air clears, all bearings are lost, and every direction looks equally hostile.

effects.message: Water supplies become harder to locate after the storm.
The terrain is now treacherous and disorienting.
Extreme temperature pockets appear without warning.
Rainfall patterns become unpredictable and dangerous.
Edible plants are buried or uprooted by the storm.
Dust stirred by the storm carries irradiated particles.
Landmarks and shelters are obliterated by the shifting sands.

name: Council of Adaptation
description: A gathering of the wisest heads commits to a brutal study of the land. The effort drains morale and erases some stored knowledge, but the insights gained make all future environments less deadly.

effects.message: The intense sessions cause unity to drop by {delta}%.
{delta}% of knowledge is overwritten with new survival data.
Permanent insight into water sources reduces future danger.
Land assessment permanently improves.
Climate adaptation becomes permanent.
Rainfall prediction permanently enhanced.
Knowledge of edible plants permanently increases safety.
Radiation hazards permanently reduced through understanding.
Shelter construction techniques improve permanently.

name: The Fork in the Wastes
description: The caravan must choose between a direct path through an old minefield or a long detour through a region known for extreme hostility. Both routes are deadly, but in different ways.

effects.message: Explosions take {delta} settlers. The path is clear but costly.
The detour leads into a brutal landscape where water is scarce and deadly.
The ground is jagged and unstable, making every step a hazard.
Unforgiving temperature swings punish the caravan.
Torrential floods and dry spells alternate without mercy.
Nothing edible grows along this cursed route.
Radiation hotspots dot the path, invisible and lethal.
There is no cover for miles, leaving the caravan exposed.

name: Automated Fortress
description: An ancient fortress bristling with automated defences offers a trove of pre‑disaster knowledge. A scout team could infiltrate, but casualties are certain. Alternatively, the caravan can bypass it unscathed.

effects.message: {delta} scouts are lost to the fortress's security systems.
The data cores yield invaluable pre‑disaster knowledge, boosting the database by {delta}%.
The caravan steers clear. No lives are lost, but the knowledge remains out of reach.

name: Frozen Bunker Vault
description: A massive bunker door lies frozen solid. Opening it requires diverting immense power from the scanners, but the promise of hundreds of survivors inside is too great to ignore. The caravan can also choose to preserve its scanners and leave the vault sealed.

effects.message: The terrain scanner suffers a {delta}% drain while melting the ice.
The atmospheric scanner loses {delta}% of its charge during the operation.
The door cracks open, revealing {delta} survivors in cold sleep. They awake and join the caravan.
The caravan decides to preserve scanner power. The frozen bunker remains sealed, its secrets untouched.

name: Double Breakdown
description: Two critical systems fail at once. The caravan must choose where to allocate the remaining repair drones: fix the scanner suite or restore the social and knowledge networks.

effects.message: Unity crumbles by {delta}% while the repair drones are occupied.
Knowledge degrades by {delta}% without maintenance.
The terrain scanner loses {delta}% efficiency.
The atmospheric scanner drops by {delta}% accuracy.

name: Flying Rock
description: A stray boulder, hurled by the wind, crashes into the terrain scanner's external array. The damage is immediate and severe.

effects.message: The terrain scanner is struck and loses {delta}% of its capability.

name: Last‑Ditch Calibration
description: The caravan can activate an experimental protocol that burns out the scanners in exchange for a permanent reduction in environmental hostility. It is a steep price for a safer future.

effects.message: The terrain scanner is sacrificed, losing {delta}%.
The atmospheric scanner loses {delta}%.
Water sources become permanently safer.
Land stability permanently improves.
Climate permanently moderates.
Rainfall patterns permanently improve.
Vegetation permanently flourishes.
Radiation levels permanently drop.
Natural shelters become permanently more common.
The caravan decides not to risk the scanners. No changes occur.

name: Cave of Echoes
description: A gaping cave mouth offers a shortcut – and untold danger. The caravan can enter and risk everything for a chance to clear the path ahead, or steer clear.

effects.message: {delta} settlers perish in the cave's depths.
The terrain scanner is damaged by cave-ins, losing {delta}%.
The atmospheric scanner is battered, losing {delta}%.
Unity fractures by {delta}% in the darkness.
{delta}% of knowledge is lost in the chaos.
The path ahead becomes far safer for water.
The ground ahead is now stable and clear.
The climate ahead is now mild.
Rainfall ahead becomes gentle.
Vegetation ahead is now abundant.
Radiation ahead drops to near-zero.
Shelter ahead is plentiful.
The caravan avoids the cave. No risk, no reward.

name: Cave of Echoes
description: A gaping cave mouth offers a shortcut – and untold danger. The caravan can enter and risk everything for a chance to clear the path ahead, or steer clear.

effects.message: {delta} settlers perish in the cave's depths.
The terrain scanner is damaged by cave-ins, losing {delta}%.
The atmospheric scanner is battered, losing {delta}%.
Unity fractures by {delta}% in the darkness.
{delta}% of knowledge is lost in the chaos.
The path ahead becomes far safer for water.
The ground ahead is now stable and clear.
The climate ahead is now mild.
Rainfall ahead becomes gentle.
Vegetation ahead is now abundant.
Radiation ahead drops to near-zero.
Shelter ahead is plentiful.
The caravan avoids the cave. No risk, no reward.

name: Shifting Resources
description: The environment can be nudged: a dam can be built to increase water, but it will flood the last fertile plains. Choose which resource to sacrifice.

effects.message: Water becomes more plentiful.
But the flood destroys vegetation.
Water becomes scarcer.
Vegetation flourishes.

name: Climate Reroute
description: By venting heat from the geothermal vents, the caravan can stabilize temperatures at the cost of rainfall. Or they can keep the rain and suffer extremes.

effects.message: Temperatures become milder.
But rainfall grows erratic.
Extremes worsen.
Rain becomes reliable.

name: Sanctuary or Safety
description: A region offers either solid radiation‑free ground or sturdy natural shelters. The caravan must decide which will serve them better in the final stretch.

effects.message: Radiation drops significantly.
Shelters become less reliable.
Radiation rises.
Shelters become abundant.

name: Last Avalanche
description: A collapsing cliff buries part of the caravan. Many are lost before they can be dug out.

effects.message: {delta} settlers are lost to the avalanche.

name: Scanner Shatter
description: A violent tremor topples the terrain scanner. Its main lens cracks, severely impairing its function.

effects.message: The terrain scanner loses {delta}% efficiency.

name: Lightning Strike
description: A bolt of lightning fries the atmospheric scanner's external probe. Its readings will never be the same.

effects.message: The atmospheric scanner is damaged by {delta}%.

name: Mass Hysteria
description: Rumours of an approaching super‑storm spark panic. The caravan's hard‑won unity evaporates in hours.

effects.message: Unity collapses by {delta}%.

name: Data Terminal Meltdown
description: The main knowledge terminal overheats and melts its memory banks. Irreplaceable data is lost.

effects.message: {delta}% of stored knowledge is destroyed.

name: Ominous Skies
description: Dark clouds gather on the horizon, swirling with unnatural speed. The elders whisper of the SuperStorm – a wall of ash and lightning that leaves nothing behind. The caravan must find a home before it arrives.

effects.message: The skies darken. The SuperStorm is coming. Settle soon.

name: Ominous Skies
description: Dark clouds gather on the horizon, swirling with unnatural speed. The elders whisper of the SuperStorm – a wall of ash and lightning that leaves nothing behind. The caravan must find a home before it arrives.

effects.message: The skies darken. The SuperStorm is coming. Settle soon.

name: Ominous Skies
description: Dark clouds gather on the horizon, swirling with unnatural speed. The elders whisper of the SuperStorm – a wall of ash and lightning that leaves nothing behind. The caravan must find a home before it arrives.

effects.message: The skies darken. The SuperStorm is coming. Settle soon.

name: Ominous Skies
description: Dark clouds gather on the horizon, swirling with unnatural speed. The elders whisper of the SuperStorm – a wall of ash and lightning that leaves nothing behind. The caravan must find a home before it arrives.

effects.message: The skies darken. The SuperStorm is coming. Settle soon.

name: SuperStorm – First Gusts
description: The SuperStorm's outer bands strike the caravan. Violent winds and searing ash leave no one unscathed.

effects.message: {delta} settlers are killed by the storm's fury.
The terrain scanner is battered, losing {delta}%.
The atmospheric scanner is shredded, losing {delta}%.
Unity cracks by {delta}%.
{delta}% of knowledge is scattered by the wind.

name: SuperStorm – First Gusts
description: The SuperStorm's outer bands strike the caravan. Violent winds and searing ash leave no one unscathed.

effects.message: {delta} settlers are killed by the storm's fury.
The terrain scanner is battered, losing {delta}%.
The atmospheric scanner is shredded, losing {delta}%.
Unity cracks by {delta}%.
{delta}% of knowledge is scattered by the wind.
